message:
test(mcp): add 53 protocol compliance and integration tests (process_triage-itkb)

Covers JSON-RPC 2.0 compliance, MCP handshake, tool/resource listing,
all 5 tool invocations, all 4 resource reads, schema validation,
error handling, security (malformed input), and full conversation flows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
